records.question: Which prices exactly equal to 35375.46418 correspond to models with acceleration 11.2, horsepower at most 139, and model number at least 78?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT price.id FROM price
JOIN production ON price.id = production.id
JOIN data ON production.id = data.id
WHERE data.acceleration = 11.2 AND data.model >= 78 AND price.price = 35375.46418 AND data.horsepower <= 139
records.pred_sql:
SELECT price.ID
FROM price
JOIN data ON price.ID = data.ID
WHERE price.price = 35375.46418
  AND data.acceleration = 11.2
  AND data.horsepower <= 139
  AND data.model >= 78

records.question: Which prices exactly $30000.0 correspond to 1980 Chevrolet Citation cars with 173.0 displacement, 28.8 mpg, at least 2595 weight, and at least 115 horsepower?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT price.id FROM price
JOIN production ON price.id = production.id
JOIN data ON production.id = data.id
WHERE data.displacement = 173.0 AND production.model_year = 1980 AND data.mpg = 28.8 AND data.car_name = 'chevrolet citation' AND data.weight >= 2595 AND data.horsepower >= 115 AND price.price = 30000.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT price.ID
FROM price
JOIN data ON price.ID = data.ID
WHERE data.car_name = 'chevrolet citation'
  AND data.displacement = 173.0
  AND data.mpg = 28.8
  AND data.weight >= 2595
  AND data.horsepower >= 115
  AND price.price = 30000.0
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM production
      WHERE production.ID = data.ID
        AND production.model_year = 1980
  )

records.question: What prices exactly equal to 14501.04894 are associated with a Toyota Mark II that has 19.0 mpg, at least model 76, displacement exactly 156.0, acceleration exactly 15.5, and six or fewer cylinders?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT price.id FROM price
JOIN production ON price.id = production.id
JOIN data ON production.id = data.id
WHERE price.price = 14501.04894 AND data.model >= 76 AND data.mpg = 19.0 AND data.car_name = 'toyota mark ii' AND data.displacement = 156.0 AND data.cylinders <= 6 AND data.acceleration = 15.5
records.pred_sql:

FROM price

  AND data.mpg = 19.0
  AND data.displacement = 156.0
  AND data.acceleration = 15.5
  AND data.cylinders <= 6
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM production
    WHERE production.ID = data.ID
      AND production.model_year >= 76
  )

records.question: Which prices are exactly 30000.0 for cars with at least 112 horsepower, exactly 121.0 displacement, no more than 2868 weight, at most 4 cylinders, 19.0 mpg, and model year at most 73?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT price.id FROM price
JOIN data ON price.id = data.id
WHERE price.price = 30000.0 AND data.horsepower >= 112 AND data.displacement = 121.0 AND data.weight <= 2868 AND data.cylinders <= 4 AND data.mpg = 19.0 AND data.model <= 73
